name: @martinkumhera/winccoa-sdm-backend
description: Semantic Data Model (SDM) backend for WinCC OA 3.21 — a webserver.js dashboard-server customization that exposes the sdm.* WebSocket command family (classes with type-in-type inheritance, instances, typed relations, ISA-95 asset hierarchy, CNS views, templates, Excel/CSV bulk import, model validation, WinCC OA project migration). Pure OA primitives (DPT/DP/CNS), redundancy-aware, scales to millions of DPEs.
